samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>4bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Input signal representing the multiplicand with a data width of "size" bits.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Input signal representing the multiplier with a data width of "size" bits.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product output signal with a data width of 2*size bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="size">4</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    
    <implementation>
        // Extending inputs with zeros
        wire [size-1:0] mul_a_ext;
        wire [size-1:0] mul_b_ext;
        
        assign mul_a_ext = {size{1'b0}} | mul_a;
        assign mul_b_ext = {size{1'b0}} | mul_b;
        
        // Generating partial products based on the multiplier's bits
        genvar i;
        generate
            for(i = 0; i < size; i=i+1) begin : gen_partial_products
                wire [size-1:0] pp_i;
                
                assign pp_i = (mul_b_ext[i]) ? (mul_a_ext << i) : 'd0;
            end
        endgenerate
        
        // Registering partial products
        reg [size*2-1:0] regs[0:size-1];
        
        integer j;
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(~rst_n) begin
                for(j = 0; j < size; j=j+1) begin
                    regs[j] <= 0;
                end
            end else begin
                for(j = 0; j < size; j=j+1) begin
                    regs[j] <= regs[j] + pp_i;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Final product calculation
        reg [size*2-1:0] mul_out_reg;
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(~rst_n) begin
                mul_out_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                mul_out_reg <= regs[size-1];
            end
        end
        
        assign mul_out = mul_out_reg;
    </implementation>
endmodule
